signals.raw:
Ethereum Foundation Stakes 70,000 ETH ($143M) | YES | HIGH confidence**

signals.headline: XRP Spot ETFs Hold $1B Assets with Inflows | YES | MED confidence**

XRP Spot ETFs Hold $1B Assets with Inflows | YES | MED confidence**

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Markup Scheduled for Late April 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
